title: Good: SECURITY comments mark critical code paths
description: Multiple files use 'SECURITY:' prefix for security-critical comments (ipv6_addr.c:64, 85, 99, 102; lora_l2.c:95, 107, 125; lichen_l2.c:71, 99, 148, 520). This consistent tagging makes security review efficient via grep.
close_reason: Positive review observation recorded; no implementation action required.
